learningObjectives.title: Understand event management
learningObjectives.description: Explain how events capture transportation milestones and improve shipment visibility.

learningObjectives.title: Understand event sources
learningObjectives.description: Describe event origins from carriers, GPS, EDI, mobile apps, and planners.

learningObjectives.title: Understand planned vs actual events
learningObjectives.description: Differentiate expected schedule milestones from actual execution milestones.

sections.content: Event Management enables SAP TM to monitor transportation execution in real time by recording important transportation events throughout the shipment lifecycle. Events provide shipment visibility, exception handling and proactive logistics management.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Events represent milestones during transportation execution. They update Freight Order statuses and allow planners to monitor shipment progress.

A truck transporting pharmaceutical products experiences a traffic delay. The GPS system sends an event to SAP TM indicating a delayed arrival. The planner receives an alert, informs the customer and updates the delivery schedule before the shipment reaches the destination.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Integrate SAP TM with GPS, telematics and carrier systems to capture transportation events automatically instead of relying on manual updates.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global logistics company integrated SAP TM with GPS devices installed on 4,500 trucks. Event Management automatically captured departure, arrival and delay events, improving shipment visibility and reducing customer support calls.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Certification questions often ask about the purpose of Event Management. Remember: it tracks transportation milestones, updates shipment status and enables exception management.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Event Management is not only for tracking delays. It monitors every important transportation milestone throughout the shipment lifecycle.

items: Event Management provides real-time shipment visibility.
Events can originate from GPS, EDI, carriers or planners.
Event tracking supports proactive exception management.
Transportation events automatically update Freight Order status.
